name: Acme Corp
description: Acme exposes billing and support APIs, two MCP servers, two A2A agents, and an installable agent-skill library.

apis.name: Billing API
apis.description: Query and modify customer billing state, invoices, and payment methods.

apis.name: All Acme APIs
apis.description: RFC 9727 api-catalog indexing every Acme API.

mcps.name: Acme search
mcps.description: Search Acme's product catalog and knowledge base.

mcps.name: Filesystem MCP
mcps.description: Reads and writes files in the workspace.

agents.name: Acme support
agents.description: Handles tier-1 customer support inquiries via A2A.

skills.name: billing-helper
skills.description: Use this when the user asks to look up an Acme invoice or update a payment method.

docs.name: Rate limit policy
docs.description: Acme's per-tier rate limits, retry behavior, and 429 response shape.
docs.whenToUse: Read this if you receive a 429 from any Acme API.

identity.name: Web Bot Auth
identity.description: Acme accepts agent identity via Web Bot Auth.

authorization.name: OAuth 2.0
authorization.description: Use the authorization-code flow for user-scoped access.
